title: Planchonella ridsdalei
taxonomy: Planchonella ridsdalei is classified under the kingdom Plantae, with its family being Sapotaceae and its order being Sapindales. It belongs to the family Sapotaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as sapotes. The order Sapindales is a group of flowering plants that includes various families such as Anacardiaceae and Rutaceae. Planchonella ridsdalei's classification is also reflected at the genus and species levels, where it is classified as Planchonella ridsdalei. Its classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
